subject: Bronzong, a large bell-shaped metallic creature with a rounded body, decorative surface markings, and stubby limbs, hovering in a swirling otherworldly atmosphere
description: A large bell-shaped metallic Pokemon floats centered in the frame against a swirling backdrop of deep purples, greys, and teal tones. The creature's body is roughly spherical with a flat bottom, teal-grey in coloring, and features decorative engraved markings across its surface. Short stubby limbs extend from either side. The background evokes a cloudy, mystical or subterranean atmosphere with no distinct landscape features. The mood is ancient and eerie.
foreground: Bronzong hovering, bell-shaped metallic body with engraved markings
background: swirling cloudy void with deep purple and grey tones
